one_line: Built a self-contained promotion-engine dashboard (artifacts/dashboard.html, no deps) that fetches a sre-degrees.promotion-manifest/v1 JSON and renders model/condition pass@1/2/5 with CI bars + a 3-test promotion gate; gen_manifest.py builds the manifest from REAL A1 (glm-5p2, 630 ep) and A2 (deepseek-v4-pro, 750 ep) numbers (10 candidates), gate PROMOTEs only the two rex rows and REJECTs all baselines + rex_no_oracle; verified via HTTP 200 + Node DOM-shim render (tot=10/prom=2/rej=8), existing experiments/dashboard.html untouched
